name: Obsolete
short_description: Obsolete is a short 2D platformer with a calm atmosphere in a very strange world where everything is deteriorating quickly. Cross the abandoned caves of this fallen world in search of an answer.
detailed_description:
Obsolete is a game of action/classic platformer/exploration in a very strange world where everything degrades very quickly.
Play as a creature coming out of the depths in search of knowledge. Why is everything so dark ?

  • Minimalist 2D graphics in a dark and strange universe.
  • Immersive/original soundtrack made by Virgil Marrel.
  • in a game featuring many secrets!

This is an immersive short game (1 hours ~) with a classic gameplay
Play it with earphone for a better experience.
